name: okta_idp_signin
description: A user signed in via a third-party Identity Provider (user.authentication.auth_via_IDP).

validation.notes: Portable. Zero user.authentication.auth_via_IDP events in 90d (no external IdP federation in use, or not ingested). Panther title resolves the IdP from the first target displayName (okta.target.0.displayName).
